authorizer_id.description: 作成した Cognito JWT Authorizer の ID

aws_region.description: AWS region (used to build integration URI)

client_id.description: Cognito App Client ID (audience) for JWT validation

cognito_user_pool_id.description: Optional: Cognito User Pool ID for compatibility

lambda_arn.description: Lambda function ARN used for integration

lambda_function_name.description: Lambda function name used for aws_lambda_permission

distribution_id.description: CloudFrontのディストリビューションID（キャッシュクリアに必要）

user_pool_issuer.description: Cognito User Pool issuer URL for JWT validation

backend_bucket_name.description: S3 bucket name for lambda deployment package (backend artifacts)

frontend_bucket_name.description: S3 bucket name used by frontend; used to scope S3 permissions

lambda_s3_key.description: S3 key for lambda deployment package

lambda_sg_id.description: Security Group ID to attach to Lambda

private_subnets.description: Private subnet IDs for Lambda VPC configuration

use_single_subnet_for_lambda.description: 開発環境では単一サブネットを使うフラグ。prod では false にすること。

vpc_id.description: VPC ID for resources that need to be created inside the VPC

rds_endpoint.description: RDSの接続エンドポイント

lambda_sg_id.description: Lambda用のセキュリティグループID

rds_sg_id.description: RDS用のセキュリティグループID

private_subnets.description: プライベートサブネットのIDリスト

public_subnets.description: パブリックサブネットのIDリスト
